data.title: Walmart, Eko cement partnership by launching new immersive, video-based shopping experiences
data.description: The two companies first launched their partnership in 2018 as a way to bring customers a more engaging shopping experience. Walmart hired Eko to develop original, interactive programming, including cooking shows and toy catalogs, while investing more than $200 million with Eko.

data.title: Ecommerce earnings recap: What you missed from Guess and RH
data.description: Both Guess and RH addressed new tariffs as their companies shared earnings results and ecommerce plans.

data.title: GoodRx launches an updated pharmacy ecommerce platform
data.description: The new online tool allows consumers using the GoodRx platform to search for medications, verify in-store inventory at participating pharmacies, confirm prescriptions on file, and pay digitally in advance.

data.title: MSC focuses on digital growth amid tariffs uncertainty
data.description: Ecommerce, which makes up about half of MSC’s online revenue, showed softness in late December and early January, but it improved as the quarter progressed.

data.title: Candle retailer Traum Fragrances shares how it started a new ecommerce business
data.description: The couple behind candle company Traum Fragrances shared what they factored in to start a new ecommerce business at the end of 2024 — and how they plan to grow in 2025.
